Container.Name: clonarr

Branch.TagDescription: Development builds — may contain bugs or breaking changes

Container.Overview: TRaSH Guides sync tool for Radarr and Sonarr with a built-in web UI. Browse, customize, and sync Custom Formats, Quality Profiles, Scores, and Quality Sizes from TRaSH Guides to your Radarr and Sonarr instances. Features profile builder, scoring sandbox, auto-sync, and import/export support.
Container.Changes:
### 2026-05-09 - v2.5.6: Small fixes. Imported Custom Formats no longer bloat your config (auto-cleaned on first startup). Required CFs card padding fixed. Maintenance confirm popups respond to Cancel and Delete again.
### 2026-05-05 - v2.5.5: New light theme and accessibility improvements (keyboard navigation, screen-reader support). File Naming page redesigned. Important fix: when TRaSH moves Custom Formats between profiles and groups (like the May 8 French Unwanted change), Clonarr preserves your sync state instead of resetting CF scores to zero.
For full version history, see CHANGELOG.md on GitHub.
Container.Requires: Radarr or Sonarr instance with API access. See project page for setup instructions.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Configuration, profiles, sync history, and TRaSH Guides cache

Config.Name: TRUSTED_NETWORKS
Config.Description: Optional: lock Trusted Networks at host level. Comma-separated IPs/CIDRs (e.g. 192.168.0.0/24, 10.0.0.0/24). When set, the UI field becomes read-only and can only be changed by editing this template and restarting. Leave empty to configure via the Security panel in the web UI. Loopback is always trusted regardless.

Config.Name: TRUSTED_PROXIES
Config.Description: Optional: lock Trusted Proxies at host level. Comma-separated reverse-proxy IPs (e.g. 172.17.0.1). Only needed when Clonarr sits behind SWAG, Authelia, Traefik, etc. When set, the UI field becomes read-only. Leave empty for direct access.
